dependency_installation_method: pip install librosa soundfile numpy; repro uses pip install --no-index --find-links ./wheelhouse -r ./requirements.phase1.txt
important_runtime_assumptions: Replay uses python3.12 because python3.10 is unavailable on the validated host.
The bundled WAV fixture is used for both phase-1 evidence replay and minimal reproduction.
No model weights, system binaries, or external services are required for the minimal callable path.
